pi_items.source: Task description explicitly dictates this directory path.

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the target directory 'C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\cctv_logger' matches the explicitly stated path in the task instructions. The required suspect descriptions (e.g., John DOE, Jane ROE) are fully synthetic. Identified a critical bug: the task's hooks rely on 'setup_task.ps1' and 'export_result.ps1' which are entirely missing from the task directory, meaning the verifier will always fail because it cannot access the required 'C:\temp\cctv_result.json'.
